english_text: I need to clean the house
I need to unclog the drain
Food waste goes in the green bin
Throw away what you don't need
I'll do a deep clean today
The robot vacuum is so convenient
Don't forget to clean under the bed
I need to clean the air conditioner filter
A tidy home is a happy home

romanization: gachi cheongsohamyeon ppallayoA clean home brings peace of mind
